name: 维克托·克雷斯波·卡多纳
name_full: 维克托·克雷斯波·卡多纳 Victor Crespo Cardona
introduction: Victor Crespo Cardona is a bilingual actor. He was born and raised in Puerto Rico, where he grew up in a theater-loving family that sparked his passion for performance at an early age. He began his journey serving in the U.S. Air Force. He later became an alumnus of the Savannah College of Art and Design (SCAD) and the New York Film Academy (NYFA), where he honed his skills in front of the camera and built a solid foundation in film and performance.Fluent in English and Spanish, Victor brings heart and range to every role. Off set, he's a nature lover with a sharp sense of humor and a deep appreciation for animals.
